title: Onboarding - Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal screens - App in the background
scenario: Verify Onboarding screens maintain state and animation after app is backgrounded for 1-2 minutes and reopened
steps: 1. Open the app and navigate to the Onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal).
2. Observe the current onboarding page and verify the animation is playing.
3. Send the app to the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
4. Wait for 1-2 minutes while the app is in the background.
5. Reopen the app by bringing it back to the foreground.
6. Check that the app remains on the same onboarding page as before being backgrounded.
7. Verify that the animation on that page is still working correctly.
expected: The app stays on the same onboarding page with the animation still working after being backgrounded for 1-2 minutes.
